rationale: Educ. Code §44.0071 governs school district reporting of instructional expenditure and employee ratios. It does not reference homestead exemptions, property tax appraised values, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict arises.
quote: Each fiscal year, a school district shall compute and report to the commissioner:
_note: No textual or operational relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this statute.
